race.comment: VEGAS MISSILE (11) was well fancied on debut last start and was not far off the mark, just missing the bob over this track and trip. Is sure to have come on from that and can go one better this time. Will just need some luck from the draw. ASTROPARTICAL (5) progressed nicely in her second out when finishing just behind VEGAS MISSILE. Peaking now and can get off the mark. DIVERGENT (13) failed to fire a shot on debut at Moe but has since gone back to the jumpouts where she's looked much improved. Gets the blinkers applied and keep Neindorf from the trial. Sharp improvement anticipated. PERFECT LINK (3) shoulders a fitness edge and is worth keeping in mind.
